title: rosa communis var. venosa
intro: Rosa communis var. venosa, also known as the fragrant dog rose or scented dog rose, is a variety of the Rosa communis species, a type of wild rose native to Europe and western Asia. The Rosa communis var. venosa plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. venosa include its ability to support digestive health, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Rosa communis var. venosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers and leaves can also be used in potpourri and perfumes.
